name: Red, White, and Blue/Black Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds Mozzarella Cheese, sliced ¼-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplant lengthwise once, then slice crosswise into semidisks about ¾-inch thick.
2. In a shallow casserole dish (at least 2 inches deep), arrange some slices of eggplant on the narrow cut edge to form a row.
3. Follow this with slices of tomato, then slices of mozzarella cheese. Repeat until the entire dish is full. The layers should appear as bands of red, white, and black from the top.
4. Season with your favorite herbs (basil or oregano are recommended).
5. Bake at 350°F for about 25-30 minutes.
This recipe serves 4-6 people. Preparation time is approximately 5 minutes, and baking takes 30 minutes. An onion layer should be placed on the bottom of the dish before adding the eggplant. This preparation works only with European-style eggplant; Japanese and Asian varieties are too narrow.
